2605.23194.title: Scalable Heterogeneous Graph Foundation Models for Data-Driven Optimal Power Flow in Smart Grids
2605.23194.paper_summary: Fast and reliable optimal power flow (OPF) approximation is essential for reliable smart-grid operation, yet many learning-based surrogates either flatten the native heterogeneous structure of power networks, target a limited set of grid topologies, or lack scalable infrastructure for graph foundation model (GFM) training. This paper presents a scalable heterogeneous graph neural network (GNN) workflow, built on HydraGNN, for data-driven OPF surrogate modeling and OPF-GFM development. The workflow preserves the distinct node and edge types of power grids -- buses, generators, loads, shunts, AC lines, transformers, and device-to-bus couplings -- and supports distributed preprocessing, training, hyperparameter optimization (HPO), and downstream fine-tuning on leadership-class supercomputers. Using three million heterogeneous graph instances spanning ten PGLib-OPF cases, from 14 to 13,659 buses, we conduct DeepHyper-driven HPO on the ORNL Frontier supercomputer. The campaign identifies compact models ($\sim$1.6--1.7M parameters) with the lowest validation losses. Downstream experiments on feasibility classification and N-1 contingency regression show that fine-tuning pretrained OPF GFM improves low-data accuracy, stabilizes training, accelerates convergence, and reduces adaptation cost when partial or head-only fine-tuning is used.
2605.23194.paper_summary_zh: 快速且可靠的最佳潮流 (OPF) 近似對於可靠的智慧電網運作至關重要，然而許多基於學習的替代方法要麼平坦化了電力網絡的原生異質結構，要麼僅針對有限的電網拓撲，或缺乏可擴展的基礎設施來進行圖形基礎模型 (GFM) 訓練。本文提出了一種可擴展的異質圖神經網絡 (GNN) 工作流程，基於 HydraGNN，旨在進行數據驅動的 OPF 替代建模和 OPF-GFM 開發。該工作流程保留了電力網格的不同節點和邊類型——母線、發電機、負載、旁路、交流線、Transformer和設備到母線的耦合——並支持在領導級超級計算機上進行分佈式預處理、訓練、超參數優化 (HPO) 和下游微調。使用跨越十個 PGLib-OPF 案例的三百萬個異質圖實例，從 14 到 13,659 母線，我們在 ORNL Frontier 超級計算機上進行 DeepHyper 驅動的 HPO。該活動識別出具有最低驗證損失的緊湊模型（約 1.6--1.7M 參數）。下游的可行性分類和 N-1 事故回歸實驗顯示，微調預訓練的 OPF GFM 改善了低數據準確性，穩定了訓練，加速了收斂，並在使用部分或僅頭部微調時降低了適應成本。
2605.23194.author: Massimiliano Lupo Pasini et.al.
2605.23194.authors: Massimiliano Lupo Pasini, Yijiang Li, Kibaek Kim, Teja Kuruganti
